title: blechnum occidentale var. intermedium
intro: Blechnum occidentale var. intermedium, also known as the intermediate lady fern or Christmas fern, is a fern species native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Blechnum occidentale var. intermedium include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the fronds in hot water or by using the dried plant material in teas and tinctures.
